case.title: LAKE v. POTOMAC LIGHT & POWER CO.

opinion.h4: LAKE v. POTOMAC LIGHT & POWER CO., (1968)
LAKE ET VIR v. POTOMAC LIGHT & POWER CO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF APPEALS OF WEST VIRGINIA. No. 364. Decided October 21, 1968.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.

DYMYTRYSHYN ET AL. v. ESPERDY, DISTRICT DIRECTOR, IMMIGRATION AND NATURALIZATION SERVICE. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 380. Decided October 21, 1968.
Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General Vinson, and Philip R. Monahan for appellee.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
